design_context: Corporate compliance and vendor onboarding dashboard. Tone is professional, trustworthy, and efficient. Avoid playful/casual styles. Emphasize data density without clutter.

rules: Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Overlines and table headers must be uppercase, tracking-[0.1em], text-xs.
All normal body text should be text-sm or text-base for high data density readability.

layout.grid_system: Bento-style grids for dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12).
layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for main cards. Table cells should have py-3 px-4. Overall spacing is generous but structured.
layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. 240px wide on desktop, collapsible to 64px. Must use theme's --sidebar color.
layout.header: Sticky top bar, solid background bg-white (NO transparent header), z-50, border-b border-border.

components.cards: Flat solid surfaces (bg-card). 1px border (border-border). No soft shadows, shadow-sm at most.
components.buttons: Slightly rounded (radius 0.25rem). Solid primary color for primary actions, outline/ghost for secondary. Use icon + text.
components.inputs: Square or slightly rounded (0.25rem). 1px border. Focus state MUST be ring-2 ring-primary/20 border-primary.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense. border-b on rows. Hover state: bg-muted/50. Text should be left-aligned unless numerical.
components.tabs: Underline style preferred over pill style. Active tab has border-b-2 border-primary text-primary.
components.drawers_modals: Must have solid bg-background. Include backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay wrapper (bg-black/40). Always include a clear close (X) icon.
components.toasts: Use Sonner component. Position bottom-right. Solid background.

status_badges.draft: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
status_badges.in_review: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-200 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
status_badges.pending_approval: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
status_badges.approved: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
status_badges.returned: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

components.workflow_stepper: Horizontal timeline above vendor forms showing current status visually.

motion.transitions: Use Framer Motion for page route transitions (fade in, slight slide up).
motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-[1px] on actionable cards. Background color shifts on rows/buttons.
rules: Avoid excessive bounce. Use ease-out or ease-in-out with short durations (150-200ms).

login_background.description: Abstract architecture, curved modern building (use with heavy dark/brand overlay for login page left panel)

empty_state_office.description: Minimalist modern desk (use for empty state in ledger or analytics)

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a PWA by adding a manifest.json in the public folder and registering a service worker (using Vite PWA plugin or manual SW file). Make sure it includes offline caching.
Implement a ThemeContext provider in React that maps the 5 user-selected themes (steel, forest, burgundy, slate, copper) to data-theme attributes on the document body.
Set up JWT Authentication context. Build a split-layout login page using the provided login_background image on the left.
Build a layout component with a Sidebar (navigation) and a solid Header.
Implement the Vendor Ledger view (Table and Grid/Card toggle). Include a search bar and filter by status.
Implement the Vendor Detail form with a heavy emphasis on Master Data input and a side-panel for 'Country Document Requirements'.
Build the Admin User Management panel (CRUD table for users and roles).
Build the Analytics Dashboard using Recharts (bar chart for country breakdown, pie chart for status distribution).
Ensure all .js files use standard React (JSX) imports without TypeScript type annotations (.jsx or .js). Use prop-types if necessary.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) for testing.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Do not use generic centered layouts. Prioritize left-aligned, highly structured data grids.
Do not use purple/violet gradients. Adhere strictly to the 5 corporate theme palettes provided.
Create depth through 1px borders and distinct background sections (bg-muted vs bg-white), NOT heavy drop shadows.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays, sidebars, or dropdowns. Always use solid colors or heavy backdrop blurs.
Every page and form interaction must provide immediate visual feedback (loading spinners, disabled states).
